articles.title: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C - BBC
articles.description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.
articles.content: Millions of people across the continent are currently "living under extreme heat, hundreds have died, schools are shut, grids are buckling", he added.
